task_description: Implement priority fixes from the code review of LTX_PRO.py: P0 critical (VRAM leak between segments, imageio quality), P1 performance (shared VAE, conditional audio, parallel prompt), P2 quality (full system prompt), review follow-ups (audio-off crash, double encode, silent ffmpeg)

verification.summary: AST parse validates successfully. All fixes implemented including review follow-ups: Pass 2 audio-off crash fixed with if _gen_audio guards, double lossy encode eliminated by piping raw frames to ffmpeg, and silent ffmpeg failure now logs the error.
